title: Day 28: Graduation — Your AI Operator Capstone

steps.title: Welcome to Graduation Day
steps.body:
This is it. Day 28. The final day of your AI Operator journey.

You've completed:

🧱 WEEK 1 — Foundation: AI basics, prompt engineering, research, agents, no-code tools
⚙️ WEEK 2 — Building: Content systems, automations, data pipelines, integrations
🔗 WEEK 3 — Connection: Operations, Marketing, Sales, Product, Finance, HR
🚀 WEEK 4 — Mission: PM, Finance, Creativity, Productivity, Learning, Career

Today you don't learn anything new. You prove what you know.

Your capstone: design and document a complete AI-powered system that solves a real problem.

You are not the same person who started Day 1.

Day 1 you: curious about AI, maybe using ChatGPT for basic tasks.

Day 28 you: an AI Operator who designs systems, deploys automations, builds no-code tools, and applies AI across business functions.

The title isn't given. It's earned — through 28 days of showing up and doing the work.
highlights: not the same person who started Day 1
The title isn't given. It's earned.

steps.title: The Capstone Vision — What an AI Operator Builds
steps.body:
A capstone isn't a test. It's a demonstration.

Previous graduates have built:

• Sarah built an AI content engine for her nonprofit — auto-generates donor newsletters, social posts, impact reports from one monthly update
• Marcus built an AI sales assistant for his real estate team — auto-qualifies leads, schedules showings, drafts listing descriptions
• Elena built a personal AI productivity system — triages email, manages calendar, generates daily plans, runs weekly reviews
• James built an AI customer support system for his SaaS — handles 70% of tickets autonomously, surfaces insights from support data

Your capstone should be something YOU need. Something that, after today, will make your work or life better every day.

steps.title: Your AI Operator Capstone Project
steps.instruction:
Design and document a complete AI-powered system. Be specific — this is your graduation submission.

Structure your capstone:

1. PROBLEM — What specific problem does this solve? (2-3 sentences)
2. SYSTEM OVERVIEW — How does it work? What's the flow from input to output?
3. AI COMPONENTS — Which skills from the course does it use? (prompts, agents, tools, automations, etc.)
4. TECH STACK — What platforms, tools, and APIs does it use?
5. USER JOURNEY — Walk through one complete use case step by step
6. BUSINESS IMPACT — What changes? Time saved, revenue gained, quality improved?
7. FUTURE VERSION — If you had unlimited resources, how would you evolve this?

Write this as a specification document someone else could build from.
steps.placeholder:
PROBLEM: As a freelance consultant, I spend 5+ hours/week on client follow-ups, status updates, and invoice reminders — time I should spend on billable work.

SYSTEM OVERVIEW: AI monitors project milestones → sends status updates → generates invoices → follows up on payments → escalates only when exceptions occur...

questions.prompt: What's the single biggest change in how you approach work and problems compared to 28 days ago?
questions.placeholder: The biggest mindset shift from this journey...

questions.prompt: What's the first AI system you'll build now that you're a certified AI Operator?
questions.placeholder: Your first project as an AI Operator...

steps.body:
Certification isn't the end. It's the beginning.

You now have the skills, the systems thinking, and the mindset of an AI Operator.

The world before Day 1: AI is something that happens to you.

The world after Day 28: AI is something you build with.

Go build.
highlights: Certification isn't the end. It's the beginning.
AI is something you build with

steps.title: 🎉 You Are Now a Certified AI Operator 🎉
steps.body:
This is your official graduation. 28 days. 4 phases. One transformation.

You started wanting to learn about AI.
You finish as someone who designs, builds, and deploys AI-powered systems.

Here's what you've earned:

✅ Foundation — You understand what AI can and can't do
✅ Prompt Engineering — You communicate with AI effectively
✅ Research Skills — You gather and synthesize information at 10x speed
✅ Automation — You build systems that run without you
✅ No-Code Tools — You deploy AI tools others can use
✅ Business Application — You apply AI across every business function
✅ Capstone — You've designed a real AI-powered system

This isn't a certificate. It's a new way of working.

Every problem you face from now on, you'll ask: 'How would an AI Operator solve this?'

Now go be one.

— The AI Operator Program 🚀
